devdoc.details: Flow:   1. Sender calls setOperator(pool, until) on CERC20 to authorize the pool   2. Sender calls queueTransfer(encRecipient, encAmount, inputProof)      - Pool pulls tokens from sender via confidentialTransferFrom      - Encrypted recipient + amount stored in queue   3. TEE operator reads the queue, decrypts recipient off-chain   4. TEE calls distribute(index, recipient, ...) to send from pool to recipient On-chain, observers see:   - sender → pool (encrypted amount, encrypted recipient)   - pool → recipient (encrypted amount)   These happen at different times, breaking temporal correlation.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params._minDelay: Minimum seconds between queue and distribute (e.g. 300 = 5 min)

params.recipient: The decrypted recipient address (known only to TEE)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

params.inputProof: FHE input proof for both encrypted values

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

devdoc.title: BagelPool - Privacy Pool for Confidential Token Transfers

SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain

distribute(uint256,address).notice: Distribute a queued transfer to its recipient.         Called by the TEE operator after decrypting the recipient off-chain.

getEncryptedAmount(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted amount handle for a queued transfer

getEncryptedRecipient(uint256).notice: Get the encrypted recipient handle for a queued transfer

minDelay().notice: Minimum delay before a queued transfer can be distributed (privacy)

operator().notice: TEE operator address (the only address that can call distribute)

queueLength().notice: Get total number of queued transfers

queueTransfer(bytes32,bytes32,bytes).notice: Queue a private transfer. The sender must have called         token.setOperator(address(this), until) beforehand.

setMinDelay(uint256).notice: Update minimum delay between queue and distribute

userdoc.notice: Breaks the on-chain link between sender and recipient.         Sender deposits to the pool with an encrypted recipient address.         A TEE operator later distributes to the actual recipients.
